mnemonics.title: Memory Management Key Functions
mnemonics.content: MEMORIZE: Memory Allocation Protection Optimization Zone Isolation Coordination Execution

mnemonics.title: Address Binding Types
mnemonics.content: CLA: Compile-time Load-time And Execution-time binding methods

acronyms.usage: Hardware that translates logical addresses to physical addresses in virtual memory systems
Primary volatile memory that provides fast read/write access to data
Non-volatile memory that retains data without power, used for firmware
Cache hardware that stores recent virtual-to-physical address translations
Allows devices to transfer data directly to/from memory without CPU intervention

visualTips.visualization: Think of logical address as a book page number and physical address as its actual location on library shelves - the MMU acts like a librarian finding the right shelf
Use pyramid diagram: top (small fast registers), middle (cache, RAM), bottom (large slow disk) - wider and darker as you go down
Picture base as starting line and limit as finish line - any jump beyond finish line triggers alarm
Imagine moving entire process suitcases between main room (RAM) and storage closet (disk) to make space

analogies.analogy: Like a hotel manager allocating rooms to guests, tracking who occupies which room, and ensuring guests stay within their assigned rooms
Like postal addresses: logical is like a PO Box number (where you think mail goes), physical is the actual street location where it's delivered
Like getting a large pizza to share with one friend - you paid for 8 slices but only needed 2, the rest is 'wasted' inside your allocation
Like parking lot spaces scattered between cars - enough total spaces but none big enough for a large vehicle
